author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Velociraptor possessed a sharp, 3-inch curved claw on the second toe of each foot, used to slash and capture prey.
Velociraptor was a small, feathered carnivorous dinosaur that lived during the Late Cretaceous period, about 75 to 71 million years ago.
